response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies; while they have some C++ exposure from early roles, it's not demonstrated as deep or sustained enough to meet core qualifications, and there's no evidence of technical leadership in cloud compute or distributed systems.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Proven open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Demonstrated ability to own ambiguous projects (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrable cloud compute platform or distributed systems leadership
Lacks evidence of mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or establishing architectural standards
